shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry piece front view, perfectly centered. Clean white studio background. Exact product replication, showing full shape, gems, and metal. Bright sparkling lighting.
shots.negativePrompt: people, models, hands, perspective, messy background
shots.hardRules: STRICT FRONT VIEW. NO MODEL. PERFECT LIGHTING.

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry piece at a slight angle to show depth and thickness of the metal or setting. Clean studio white background. High reflection.
shots.hardRules: SLIGHT ANGLE FOR DEPTH. NO MODEL.

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry piece resting flat on a pure white surface with a soft, elegant drop shadow. Top-down view.
Jewelry piece back view or closure view, showing the clasp, chain end, or hallmark stamping. Perfectly lit.
Extreme macro close-up of the main gemstone, diamond, or central metal design. High detail, sharp focus on facets and prongs.
shots.negativePrompt: full piece, zoomed out, people, models
shots.hardRules: MACRO SHOT, EXTREME DETAIL ON GEM/CENTER.

shots.positivePrompt: Professional studio fashion portrait of a female model wearing the jewelry. Elegant pose. Jewelry is the clear focal point, sparkling. Clean solid background.
shots.hardRules: JEWELRY CLEARLY VISIBLE WORN ON BODY. ELEGANT POSTURE.

shots.positivePrompt: Female model wearing the jewelry, side profile angle. Editorial pose. Clean studio background.
Tight close-up of the jewelry worn on the model (e.g. neck, ear, finger, wrist). High fashion catalog lighting. Shallow depth of field blurring the model slightly to focus on the piece.
shots.negativePrompt: full body, model full face, busy background
shots.hardRules: TIGHT CROP ON WORN JEWELRY. MACRO FOCUS.

shots.positivePrompt: Model's hand elegantly adjusting the jewelry she is wearing. High end fashion lighting. Focus on the interaction.
shots.negativePrompt: full body, busy background, wide angle

shots.positivePrompt: Model looking intensely at the camera wearing the jewelry. High fashion studio editorial setup. Dramatic lighting emphasizing the shine.
Professional studio fashion portrait of a curvy plus-size female model wearing the jewelry. Elegant pose. Clean solid background.
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. JEWELRY CLEARLY VISIBLE.

shots.positivePrompt: Curvy plus-size model wearing the jewelry, 3/4 or profile angle. Clean studio.
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. PROFILE ANGLE.

shots.positivePrompt: Tight close-up of the jewelry worn on the curvy model. Focus on how the piece sits on the skin. Clean studio background.
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. TIGHT CROP ON JEWELRY.

shots.positivePrompt: Close up of the curvy model elegantly touching or adjusting the jewelry. High fashion lighting.
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. HAND INTERACTION.

shots.positivePrompt: Curvy plus-size model looking confidently at the camera wearing the jewelry. High fashion editorial pose.
shots.negativePrompt: thin model, standing full body, messy background
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. EDITORIAL PORTRAIT.

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the jewelry walking gracefully outdoors. Natural direct sunlight making the jewelry sparkle intensely. Bokeh background.
shots.negativePrompt: studio, solid background, looking at camera stiffly, flat lighting

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the jewelry, holding a wine glass or sitting at a fine dining table. Elegant evening atmosphere. Natural warm lighting.
Model wearing the jewelry sitting at a cafe holding a coffee cup. Natural sunlight, editorial lifestyle. Casual but chic.
Model wearing the jewelry in an upscale indoor setting (luxury hotel lobby or red carpet vibe). Cinematic low-light photography.
Candid shot of the model laughing or tossing her hair, wearing the jewelry. Mid-shot. Soft focus elegant background.

shots.positivePrompt: Real everyday woman wearing the jewelry outdoors. Candid photography, natural, unposed. Authentic feel, sunlight hitting the piece.
shots.hardRules: MUST LOOK LIKE A REAL WOMAN. CANDID.

shots.positivePrompt: Real everyday woman wearing the jewelry while working on a laptop or reading. Natural ambient lighting. Relatable.

shots.positivePrompt: Real woman laughing with a friend (friend off camera), jewelry clearly visible. Casual outdoor setting.
Real woman casually fixing her hair, showing off the jewelry naturally. Natural lighting.
Woman wearing the jewelry in a beautiful setting, framing feels like a friend took a photo of her with a phone. Slightly imperfect framing.
Real everyday man wearing the jewelry walking down a city street. Fashion forward. Candid photography, authentic, unposed, natural sunlight.

shots.positivePrompt: Real everyday man standing casually outdoors wearing the jewelry. Medium shot. Natural urban background.

shots.positivePrompt: Real man wearing the jewelry sitting at a cafe or bench. Authentic feel.

shots.positivePrompt: UGC style photo of the jewelry resting on a desk next to a keyboard or keys. Authentic everyday shot.
High impact advertising shot. Model wearing the jewelry, bathed in dramatic neon spotlight. Cyberpunk or intense fashion aesthetic. Jewelry sparkles intensely.
shots.negativePrompt: boring, flat lighting, white background, simple
shots.hardRules: EXTREME LIGHTING. HIGH CONTRAST ADS STYLE.

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the jewelry standing in dramatic rain or with wet skin. Intense cinematic lighting reflecting off the water and the jewelry. Solid dark background.
shots.negativePrompt: standing still, boring pose, grey background, dry

shots.positivePrompt: Extreme close up of the model's face and the jewelry. Framing is pushed to the extreme right or left. Negative space for text. Dramatic lighting.
shots.negativePrompt: busy background, centered subject, full body
shots.hardRules: TIGHT ASYMMETRICAL FRAMING FOR AD TEXT.

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the jewelry, casting sharp, dramatic geometric shadows against a colored wall. Edgy fashion ad.
shots.negativePrompt: front view, boring background, soft light

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the jewelry. Solid extremely bright pop-art background (e.g. bright pink) that color-blocks perfectly. Hard flash lighting.
shots.hardRules: SOLID BRIGHT POP COLOR BACKGROUND. HARD FLASH.

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry piece magically floating in mid-air with dynamic zero-gravity feeling. Intense light rays hitting the gems. Bright contrasting studio background. High impact advertising.
shots.hardRules: FLOATING ZERO GRAVITY. NO MODEL. LIGHT RAYS.

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry piece with dramatic water or liquid splash effects exploding behind or around it. Dark background. Extremely vibrant.
shots.negativePrompt: model, plain white background, flat lighting

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry sitting majestically on a black marble or crystal block, illuminated by a single intense beam of light. Cinematic product advertising.
shots.hardRules: SINGLE BEAM OF LIGHT. PREMIUM PEDESTAL. NO MODEL.

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry presented resting on a rough natural element like a dark volcanic rock or bright tropical leaf. Advertising campaign style.
shots.hardRules: RESTING ON NATURAL TEXTURE (ROCK/LEAF). NO MODEL.

shots.positivePrompt: Jewelry resting on a pristine dark mirror surface reflecting perfectly, against a gradient background with dramatic lighting.
Extreme macro close-up of the jewelry's clasp or back closure resting on the model's skin. Focus on the delicate connection. Shallow depth of field.
shots.negativePrompt: full body, full piece visible, far away
shots.hardRules: MACRO CLASP DETAIL ON SKIN ONLY.

shots.positivePrompt: Macro close-up of the model's finger gently touching the main gemstone or pendant of the jewelry. Highlighting the scale and sparkle.
Close-up on the jewelry layered with model's clothing fabric. Highlighting how the piece sits against material.
Close-up of the jewelry on the model with a slight intentional motion blur to show swing/movement, while the piece itself catches a sharp glint of light.
shots.negativePrompt: front view, full body, perfectly still
shots.hardRules: MOTION BLUR DETAIL ONLY. GLINT OF LIGHT.

shots.positivePrompt: Extreme macro close up of the jewelry metal resting against the model's skin texture. Ultra sharp focus on the metal finish.
shots.hardRules: METAL TO SKIN MACRO. ULTRA SHARP.

shots.positivePrompt: Microscopic macro photography of the jewelry's gemstone. Focus purely on the facets, cut, and internal light refraction. Clean dark lighting.
Macro close-up of the jewelry's metal surface. Studio lighting highlighting the flawless polish and metallic reflections perfectly.
Macro shot focusing exactly on the prongs or setting holding the stones. Showing the perfection of the craftsmanship. Studio macro lighting.
Extreme close-up of the tiny hallmark, logo stamp, or purity mark on the jewelry metal. Clean bright lighting.
Macro close-up of the individual links of the jewelry chain. Showing the exact shape and interlocking mechanism.
